disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep cut to the volar forearm from a slipped kitchen knife about 45 minutes ago, gaping open with visible subcutaneous fat
trigger_question_examples: How deep does the cut look?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I was chopping vegetables about 45 minutes ago and the chef's knife slipped. The cut gapes open and I can see yellow fat inside.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Continuous dark venous ooze that slows with firm pressure; no bright-red pulsatile spurting
trigger_question_examples: What does the bleeding look like — is it dark and oozing or bright red and spurting?
Does pressing on it slow the bleeding?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's dark blood that oozes out steadily. When I press hard with the towel it slows down. It's not squirting or bright red.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Normal gross movement of all fingers and wrist and normal sensation reported by the patient
trigger_question_examples: Can you bend and straighten every finger and your wrist normally?
Is any part of the hand numb or tingling?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, I can move all my fingers and my wrist fine, and the hand feels completely normal — no numbness or tingling.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Last tetanus-containing vaccine was about 12 years ago; wound sustained during food preparation (contaminated)
trigger_question_examples: When did you last have a tetanus shot?
Was the knife or board dirty or used for food?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My last tetanus shot was around 12 years ago. The knife and board were being used for chopping vegetables.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not taking anticoagulants or antiplatelets; no bleeding disorder reported
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any blood thinners like warfarin, aspirin or a NOAC?
Have you ever had a problem with bleeding or clotting?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't take any blood thinners or aspirin, and I've never had a bleeding problem.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient is anxious but feels well otherwise — not faint, dizzy, pale or clammy
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel faint, dizzy, or like you might pass out?
Apart from the arm, do you feel unwell in yourself right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm anxious and it hurts, but I don't feel faint or dizzy — just worried about the bleeding.
